items.hook: Jane Campion remembers Sam Neill: ‘He was radiating peace, beaming love’
items.body:
The Piano director shares her memories of the actor on set – and the last time she saw him in hospital

  • Sam Neil

items.hook: Marius Olteanu is in post-production on sophomore feature We Won't Get Old Together - Production / Funding - Romania/France
items.body: The Romanian-French co-production follows a gay architect whose life unravels after an unexpected death

items.hook: Nicolas Boukhrief shooting 14 juillet - Production / Funding - France/Belgium
items.body: Alexandra Lamy, Camille Rutherford and Jonathan Zaccaï are starring in the filmmaker’s new movie, produced by Bizibi and Dimanche Soir, and set to be sold by The Bureau Sales

items.hook: The OOPic is an Object Oriented Programmable Integrated Circuit.
items.body: Created by Savage Innovations, this PIC microcontroller comes with an IDE that supports programming in syntaxes based on the BASIC, Java and C programming languages. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Disney’s ‘Moana’ tops UK-Ireland box office with £2.8m as ‘Toy Story 5’ passes £40m
items.body: Meanwhile, Studiocanal’s ’Evil Dead Burn’ opened in fourth place.

items.opener: Here's one for the group chat —
items.hook: Edwin Mullhouse: The Life and Death of an American Writer 1943–1954, by Jeffrey Cartwright is the critically acclaimed debut novel by American author Steven Millhauser, published in 1972 and written in the form of a biography of a fictitious person by a fictitious author.
items.body: It was Millhauser's best known novel until the publication of his Pulitzer Prize-winning Martin Dressler in 1997, and according to Patrick McGrath writing in The New York Times it is his best work. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Razlog is a town and ski resort in Razlog Municipality, Blagoevgrad Province in southwestern Bulgaria.
items.body: It is situated in the Razlog Valley and was first mentioned during the reign of Byzantine emperor Basil II. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Interview: Jerry Carlsson, Frida Mårtensson • Director and producer of Selamlik - “The queer perspective on war has not often been told in cinema” - Karlovy Vary 2026 - KVIFF Industry Days
items.body: The Swedish director frames a queer Syrian love story spanning Damascus and Córdoba, exploring exile, displacement and the search for home

items.hook: PC LOAD LETTER is a printer error message that has entered popular culture as a technology meme referring to a confusing or inappropriate error message.
items.body: It is a real message that can be displayed by an HP LaserJet, and indicates the printer does not have the US letter sized paper needed to complete a particular print job. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Bectu head Philippa Childs to leave UK union
items.body: She will stand down in January 2027.

items.hook: Daniele Luchetti shooting Dove non mi hai portata, starring Tecla Insolia and Margherita Buy - Production / Funding - Italy
items.body: Adapted from Maria Grazia Calandrone’s Strega Prize-shortlisted novel, the film is an Italian-Spanish co-production between Fandango, Vision Distribution and BTeam Prods
